heading: Push Live Migration APIs
body:
To run tasks associated with the live migration procedure, see
[Push Live Migration API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-creategrouplivemigration).

> **Note:** The Live Migration APIs mention Cloud Manager or Ops Manager, however, the type of live migration
> described in this section only supports migrating source clusters
> monitored in Cloud Manager to destination clusters in Atlas.
